motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class FreqStack:

    def __init__(self):
        self.freq = {}
        self.max_freq = 0
        self.stack = []

    def push(self, val: int) -> None:
        freq = self.freq.get(val, 0) + 1
        self.freq[val] = freq
        if freq > self.max_freq:
            self.max_freq = freq
        self.stack.append((freq, val))

    def pop(self) -> int:
        freq, val = self.stack.pop()
        self.freq[val] -= 1
        if not self.freq[val]:
            del self.freq[val]
        return val
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(N)
energy implications: LOW
